description: A self-hosted, Docker-based CMS for editorial blogs with MDX editor, RBAC, AI features, and a public SSG blog frontend.

stories.title: Docker Compose setup and First Run wizard
stories.description: Scaffold the full Docker Compose stack (app, blog, db/SQLite, redis, nginx). Implement the 4-step First Run wizard: Owner registration, DB selection, SMTP config, and blog identity. Redirect /admin to /admin/setup when no Owner exists; block re-entry after setup. Generate .env.example with all required variables.

stories.title: Owner registration and JWT authentication
stories.description: Implement user registration with bcrypt (cost 12), email confirmation (24h token, double opt-in), admin approval flow, and status machine (pending_email → pending_approval → active). Implement JWT login: accessToken (15min) + refreshToken (7d, httpOnly cookie, rotated on use). Implement /api/auth/refresh and /api/auth/logout. Add brute-force protection: 5 failures in 15 min = 30 min IP block. Log all login attempts.

stories.title: Base Design System — Onyx theme and design tokens
stories.description: Implement CSS design tokens for the Onyx theme: color palette (--bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --bg-elevated, --accent, --text-*, --border), typography scale (Newsreader + Inter, text-hero through text-xs), spacing scale (4px base), border-radius tokens, and semantic colors. All colors must pass WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (4.5:1). Implement base components: Button (primary/secondary/ghost/danger), Input, Card, Modal, Badge, Toast. Include :focus-visible and prefers-reduced-motion support.

stories.title: Storybook with base component documentation
stories.description: Set up Storybook with @storybook/addon-a11y. Document all base components (Button, Input, Card, Modal, Badge, Toast) with stories for every state, variant, and theme. Mark components with stable/beta/deprecated status. Zero a11y violations on all stories.

stories.title: MDX Editor (without AI) — split view, toolbar, frontmatter, auto-save
stories.description: Build the MDX editor with split-view layout (editor left, rendered preview right), Full Editor and Full Preview toggle modes. Implement the toolbar (bold, italic, strike, H1-H3, link, image picker, code block, inline code, blockquote, lists, table, hr, Callout). Implement FrontmatterDrawer: title, subtitle, excerpt, category (inline create), tags (multi-select, inline create), publish date, language, visibility, cover image picker, translation link, SEO title/description, SEO preview snippet. Auto-save draft every 30s; Ctrl+S manual save. beforeunload warning for unsaved changes.

stories.title: Post publishing with public visibility and MDX rendering
stories.description: Implement post CRUD backend (create, read, update, delete, list). Support publishing posts with visibility=public. Implement MDX rendering with Shiki syntax highlighting (dark theme aligned to Design System), styled blockquotes, custom lists, figure+figcaption images, Callout components (info/warning/danger/success), and footnotes. Auto-generate slug from title. Calculate readingTime (words ÷ 200). Sanitize MDX content with DOMPurify server-side before storing.

stories.title: Public blog — Home page (HeroSection, BioCard, PostGrid)
stories.description: Build the SSG public blog Home (/). Implement HeroSection (featured post, 16:9 cover, text-hero title, CTA button), BioCard (owner avatar, name, bio, social links — sticky on desktop, below hero on mobile), PostGrid (top 12 posts by views, mosaic layout, skeleton screens, LoadMoreButton). SEO: title tag, meta description, og:image, JSON-LD WebSite+Person, canonical. No iPrivate posts in generated HTML.

stories.title: Public blog — Feed page (/blog) with search and filters
stories.description: Build the SSG blog feed (/blog). Implement SearchBar (real-time autocomplete, 300ms debounce, / shortcut, empty state), FilterBar (sticky, category dropdown, tag multi-select, date year/month, active chips, URL-reflected filters, dynamic H1). PostCardList (vertical editorial layout, thumbnail left, 20/page pagination). SEO: dynamic title+description per filter, JSON-LD ItemList, sitemaps per category/tag/date, noindex for search queries.

stories.title: Public blog — Post reading page (/blog/[slug])
stories.description: Build the SSG post page (/blog/[slug]). Implement FloatingProgressBar (2-3px, --accent, scroll-based, aria-hidden), ArticleHeader (cover image, category badge, tags, title, subtitle, author+date+readTime), MDXContent (Newsreader, 18px, 1.75 line-height, max 70ch, Shiki highlighting, scroll tables, styled blockquotes, callouts, footnotes), RecommendationSection (3 posts same category), NewsletterCard (double opt-in, privacy checkbox), CommentSystem placeholder. SEO: full Open Graph, JSON-LD Article, canonical, hreflang.

stories.title: Public REST API v1 — posts, categories, tags with rate limiting
stories.description: Implement GET /api/v1/posts (pagination, category/tag/lang/sort filters), GET /api/v1/posts/:slug (full content as sanitized HTML), GET /api/v1/categories, GET /api/v1/tags. Apply rate limiting: 60 req/min per IP using Redis sliding window. Include X-RateLimit-* headers in all responses. Return 404 for private posts (not 403). Security headers: CSP, nosniff, DENY, HSTS, Cache-Control. CORS: GET+OPTIONS, any origin. OpenAPI 3.0 docs at /api/v1/docs.

stories.title: Unit and integration tests for v0.1 features
stories.description: Write unit tests (Vitest) covering: auth (hashPassword, verifyPassword, generateToken, generateRefreshToken), RBAC helpers, slugify, calculateReadingTime, isVisibleTo. Write integration tests (Supertest + in-memory SQLite) covering: POST /api/auth/login (200/401/403/429, httpOnly cookie), GET /api/v1/posts (public-only filter, rate limit, pagination), POST /api/posts (201/403/401, slug, XSS rejection), Newsletter Double Opt-in (pending → confirm → active, expired token 400). Target 90%+ coverage on auth and RBAC logic.

stories.title: User registration with email confirmation and admin approval
stories.description: Implement public registration form (name, nickname, email, phone, password with strength indicator). Status machine: pending_email → pending_approval → active → suspended. Email confirmation (24h token, resend option). Admin notification on new pending user. Approval/rejection flow with email feedback. Login blocked until status=active with appropriate error messages per status. First login: category interest selection (min 1).

stories.title: RBAC Access Matrix — per-group and per-user permissions
stories.description: Implement full RBAC: resource × operation matrix (posts, comments, users, groups, permissions, tags, categories, images, newsletter, metrics, settings, notifications, AI). Humanized checkbox labels in UI. Per-group and per-user configuration. Individual permission overrides group permission. Permission resolution hierarchy: individual > highest-privilege group > default group. Owner role bypasses all checks. roles owner and default are immutable.

stories.title: Group management — create, edit, membership, permissions
stories.description: Implement CRUD for custom groups (name, description, members multi-select). Show default groups (owner, default) with 'Default' badge, no delete/rename. Each group has its own Access Matrix. Users can belong to multiple groups simultaneously. CRUD UI: list with member count, create/edit modal, member management, permission configuration.

stories.title: Audit trail — log all sensitive actions
stories.description: Log all sensitive actions: login (success+failure), user approval/rejection, role/permission changes, post publish/edit/delete, settings changes, API key insert/remove, RBAC changes. Fields: actorId, actorEmail, action, targetId, targetType, metadata (before/after JSON), ipAddress, userAgent, timestamp. Audit trail UI (Owner only): filterable log viewer.

stories.title: All post visibility levels with RBAC enforcement
stories.description: Implement all visibility levels: public, allPrivate (login+approval), groupPrivate (login+group membership), listPrivate (login+list membership), iPrivate (author/owner only). Blog public: restricted posts show blur(8px) + RBACBanner (lock icon, message, login/register CTAs). API: private posts return 404. SSG: iPrivate posts excluded from generated HTML entirely. FrontmatterDrawer: conditional group/list selector when groupPrivate/listPrivate selected.

stories.title: Admin panel — layout, sidebar, dashboard, and admin CRUDs
stories.description: Build the admin panel layout: DynamicSidebar (280px expanded, 64px collapsed, hover-expand, mobile drawer+overlay), Header (blog name+logo, notification badge, user avatar dropdown), FAB 'New Post', Ctrl+K command palette, critical notification banners. Dashboard: MetricCards (sparklines for visitors/views/engagement/SEO/newsletter), ActivityFeed (20 recent events), TopPostsWidget (5 posts), QuickActions. User CRUD: list with status filters, pending badge, approve/reject, role/group edit, suspend/reactivate, profile detail view, session management. Group CRUD and RBAC matrix UI.

stories.title: E2E tests — registration, approval, and RBAC flows
stories.description: Write Playwright E2E tests: First Run wizard creates Owner and redirects to Dashboard; second access to /admin/setup redirects to login. User registers, confirms email, waits for approval, gets approved, logs in. Owner sets RBAC permissions per group. Post with visibility=allPrivate not visible to anonymous visitor but visible to logged-in approved user. Use PostgreSQL in container + MailHog for email capture.

stories.title: Comment system with threads, voting, moderation, and notifications
stories.description: Implement comments: model (id, postId, parentId, authorId, content max 2000, status, upvotes, downvotes). Comments inherit post visibility. Login required to comment/vote. One vote per user per comment, toggle support. Thread replies (1 level deep in UI, indented with --accent line, collapse/expand >5 replies). Moderation: visible/hidden/flagged; user can report (→flagged); admin can hide/delete/restore. Notifications: post author on new comment, user on reply. Admin CRUD: list with status filter, hide/show/delete actions.

stories.title: Post likes system
stories.description: Implement post likes: heart icon on PostCard and post page (outline → filled when liked). 1 like per user per post (toggle). Optimistic UI update with server rollback on error. Count visible to all. Login required to like — unauthenticated click shows 'Login to like' modal/tooltip. Pulse animation on like. Track like counts in post metrics.

stories.title: Social sharing — WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Instagram link copy, Clipboard
stories.description: Implement share dropdown on PostCard, ArticleHeader, and RecommendationSection. Channels: WhatsApp (wa.me URL), LinkedIn (share-offsite URL), Instagram (clipboard copy + 'Link copied! Paste on Instagram.' tooltip), Copy Link (Clipboard API). Share count visible to all. Registering a share (incrementing count) requires login. Anti-spam: 1 registration per user per post per hour. Full Open Graph metadata on all post pages.

stories.title: Newsletter with Double Opt-in, unsubscribe, and LGPD compliance
stories.description: Implement NewsletterCard on post pages: email input, mandatory privacy checkbox (link to /privacidade), disabled submit until checked. Double Opt-in: UUID token (48h expiry), confirmation email, /newsletter/confirm?token= endpoint. Handle already-active, already-pending, and new subscriber cases. Unsubscribe: link in all emails, /newsletter/unsubscribe?token=, one-click, status→unsubscribed (not deleted). Admin CRUD: subscriber list with status filter, CSV export, remove action. /privacidade public page.

stories.title: Multilingual posts (pt-BR + EN) with toggle and SEO hreflang
stories.description: Implement translationGroupId linking between post versions. Language toggle in ArticleHeader (flag + code, disabled with tooltip if no translation). Editor: language field in FrontmatterDrawer, 'linked translation' search field. Admin list: badge showing if post has a translation. SEO: hreflang tags (pt-BR, en, x-default) in post page head. API: translations array in /api/v1/posts/:slug response.

stories.title: Post scheduling and version history
stories.description: Post scheduling: FrontmatterDrawer date accepts future dates; status=scheduled; cron job publishes at scheduled time. Admin panel: scheduled posts list with countdown. Version history: snapshot on each publish or manual save. Version list UI: date, author, change summary. Diff view between versions. Restore previous version. Max 50 versions per post (purge oldest).

stories.title: Additional color themes (Emerald, Crimson, Slate, Amber, Rose, Violet)
stories.description: Implement the remaining 6 themes: Emerald, Crimson, Slate, Amber, Rose, Violet. Each follows the same CSS token structure as Onyx. All must pass WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text and UI components). Theme selector in admin settings. Storybook: stories for all themes on each component.

stories.title: Social Cards Generator (Instagram, Stories, LinkedIn, Twitter/X)
stories.description: Build Social Cards Generator in admin panel. Select existing post or enter data manually. Formats: Instagram 1:1 (1080×1080), Stories 9:16 (1080×1920), LinkedIn 1.91:1 (1200×627), Twitter/X 2:1 (1200×600). Real-time preview with Design System applied. Editable fields: title, subtitle, author, logo, background image. Export as high-res PNG.

stories.title: E2E tests — comments, likes, sharing, and newsletter flows
stories.description: Playwright E2E: logged-in user comments on public post and comment appears. Non-logged user sees 'Login to comment' button. User upvotes a comment and count increments. User fills email+checkbox, clicks subscribe, sees 'Check your email'. Confirmation link shows 'Subscription confirmed'. User likes a post and heart fills. Share dropdown opens and copy-link works. All tests use MailHog + PostgreSQL container.

stories.title: Notification integrations — Teams, Slack, Discord, email webhooks
stories.description: Admin panel Notifications settings: enable/configure each channel individually (Teams webhook URL, Slack webhook URL, Discord webhook URL, SMTP). Configurable events per channel: new pending user, new comment, suspicious login, post published, critical system error. Test send button on configure. Trigger notifications from corresponding system events.

stories.title: Social media profiles and auto-share on publish
stories.description: Admin Redes Sociais screen: configure GitHub, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, X/Twitter URLs. Where direct API integration is possible: OAuth token config, auto-share post to network on publish. Show connection status badge per network.

stories.title: Email Marketing — campaign editor, send, schedule, and history
stories.description: Email Marketing screen (disabled until SMTP configured, with setup prompt). When active: create campaigns with simple template editor ({{nome}} variables), send to newsletter subscriber list, schedule sends, view campaign history with open/click metrics if available.

stories.title: AI system — provider config, per-user enable/disable, quota management
stories.description: IA & Cotas admin screen (Owner only): ProviderConfig (OpenAI/Anthropic/compatible, masked API key, test connection, status badge). GlobalUsageOverview (total tokens this month, estimated USD cost, bar chart by user). UserQuotaTable (per-user cota, used tokens, %, progress bar green/yellow/red). QuotaManager: slider/input for monthly tokens, preview ('~X articles'), toggle monthly reset, accumulating option. API keys stored AES-256-GCM encrypted, never returned in responses.

stories.title: Ghost Writer — AI autocomplete in MDX editor
stories.description: Implement AI autocomplete in the MDX editor (only when Owner has enabled AI for the user and API key is configured). Trigger: 1.5s pause in typing. Show ghost text (--text-muted, italic) after cursor. Tab = accept full suggestion, → = accept word by word, Esc/continue typing = discard. Context: last 500 tokens + title + category + language. Max 2 sentences per suggestion. Token usage badge: 'AI Active — X/Y tokens today'. Badge updates in real time.

stories.title: AI Image Generator — prompt-based image creation with crop
stories.description: Image Generator accessible from Image Library and MDX toolbar. Fields: descriptive prompt, aspect ratio (16:9/1:1/9:16), optional style (Photographic/Illustration/Abstract). Shows 4 variations. User selects one → saved to Image Library. Crop tool before saving. Auto-generated alt text (editable). Images tagged with aiGenerated: true metadata. Tokens charged per generation.

stories.title: Microsoft Clarity analytics integration
stories.description: Inject Microsoft Clarity script in public blog <head> (not in admin panel). Enable only for non-logged-in users. Owner can enable/disable in Settings. Configuration: Clarity Project ID field in settings.

stories.title: Detailed metrics dashboard with charts and export
stories.description: Metrics screen with period filter (7d/30d/3m/12m/custom). Charts: unique visitors × page views over time, top posts ranking (views), traffic sources (organic/direct/referral/social), engagement rate (likes+comments÷views), newsletter subscriber growth, SEO score per post. Export: email summary to user with metrics:read permission, notification link (Teams/Slack/Discord integration).

stories.title: AI Trends Analysis — identify growing topics and content gaps
stories.description: Trends screen in AI & Quotas (users with AI enabled). User selects category + time window (7/30/90 days). System analyzes posts, tags, view growth. AI generates report: top 5 growing topics, declining topics, content gap suggestions. Displayed as scored list with justifications. 'Create post on this topic' button opens editor with pre-filled title. Tokens charged to user quota.

stories.title: AI Auto-translation — generate EN draft from pt-BR post
stories.description: In MDX editor (for pt-BR posts, user with AI enabled): 'Translate to EN' in AI menu. Confirmation modal showing token estimate. On confirm: save current post, AI translates title/subtitle/excerpt/content, create draft with lang:en + linked translationGroupId. Open translated draft in editor. Persistent warning: 'Review before publishing. AI may make mistakes.' Tokens charged to user quota.

stories.title: Ideas CRUD — brainstorm board with ratings and draft conversion
stories.description: Admin Ideias screen: create ideas with title, optional description, rating 0-10, share with specific users. List sorted by rating descending. Color-coded rating badge by range. Filters: minimum rating, shared/not-shared. Actions: create, edit, 'Convert to Draft' (opens editor with pre-filled title), delete.

stories.title: C4 Model architecture diagram in admin panel
stories.description: Admin C4 Model screen: render C4 diagram (Context, Container, Component levels) from PlantUML or Mermaid source. Owner can edit diagram source inline. Version history of diagram. Updated per release.

stories.title: Public Storybook static page deployment
stories.description: Configure Storybook static build. Set up deployment pipeline to publish Storybook as a separate static site (e.g., GitHub Pages or CDN). All components with all states, variants, and themes visible publicly.

stories.title: System documentation page — editable markdown, versioned
stories.description: Admin Documentation screen: render system documentation as markdown. Editable by Admin with permission. Version history. Updated per release by maintainer.

stories.title: Security audit — OWASP ZAP scan and manual security review
stories.description: Run OWASP ZAP automated scan against the full application. Fix all high and medium severity findings. Manually verify: authentication, authorization, rate limiting, XSS (DOMPurify on all free-text fields), SQL injection (prepared statements only), CSRF (tokens + SameSite=Strict), security headers on all responses. Validate headers via securityheaders.com equivalent in E2E tests.

stories.title: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility certification across all pages and themes
stories.description: Run axe-core via Playwright on every page across all 7 themes. Zero AA violations required. Verify: all contrast ratios (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large+UI), keyboard navigation (logical tab order, focus-visible on all interactive elements), focus traps in modals/drawers, Escape closes overlays, semantic HTML (main/nav/header/footer/article/aside/section, correct heading hierarchy), ARIA attributes (aria-expanded, aria-live, aria-current, role=dialog+aria-labelledby), screen reader compatibility (sr-only, aria-live toasts), table captions+th scope.

stories.title: Releases screen with changelog and current version badge
stories.description: Admin Releases screen: list of releases with version, date, type (major/minor/patch), changelog in rendered markdown. 'Current version' badge on active release. Link to commits or PR. Version update check on startup with 'New version available' badge for Owner. Changelog page updated per release.

stories.title: MCP server support for CMS extensibility
stories.description: Implement MCP (Model Context Protocol) server interface for the Nexus CMS API, enabling AI agents and external tools to interact with the CMS programmatically. Document supported tools and resources.

stories.title: Open-source community files — LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, SECURITY
stories.description: Create LICENSE (MIT or compatible open-source license), CONTRIBUTING.md (setup, branching strategy, PR process, coding standards, test requirements), CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md (Contributor Covenant), SECURITY.md (responsible disclosure process, security contact). All files in repository root.

stories.title: Complete CI/CD pipeline — lint, test, build, E2E, security
stories.description: Configure full CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or equivalent). Jobs: lint (ESLint + TypeScript check), test-unit (Vitest), test-integ (Testcontainers), test-e2e (Playwright, all critical flows), test-a11y (axe-core via Playwright, zero AA violations), build (docker compose build), security (OWASP ZAP, releases only). Merge to main blocked if any job fails.
